job_description: Senior NLP Engineer needed for production RAG systems. Requires Python, vector databases, and LLM evaluation experience.
feedback_if_recommended: Great recommendation. The profile strongly matches RAG and NLP production requirements.
feedback_if_not_recommended: This should likely have been recommended because the CV aligns with core NLP and RAG requirements.

job_description: Frontend-only UI role focused on animation-heavy React websites with minimal backend exposure.
feedback_if_recommended: Recommendation is too optimistic. Candidate background is backend and NLP, not frontend-heavy UI.
feedback_if_not_recommended: Good rejection. This role does not align with the candidate's strengths.

job_description: Machine Learning Platform Engineer. Build model deployment tooling, experiment tracking, CI/CD for ML, and feature-store integrations. Strong Python, Docker, Kubernetes, and observability required.
feedback_if_recommended: Strong call. Platform, production ML, and reliability are all directly aligned with this candidate.
feedback_if_not_recommended: This should have been recommended. The role matches the candidate's MLOps and production background.

job_description: Junior Data Analyst internship. Mostly spreadsheet reporting and dashboard maintenance. Little coding and no machine learning production ownership.
feedback_if_recommended: Likely overleveled recommendation. Candidate is too senior and technical for this scope.
feedback_if_not_recommended: Correct rejection. Seniority and skill depth do not fit this junior role.

job_description: Applied Scientist for multimodal retrieval systems in healthcare. Requires evaluation rigor, retrieval pipelines, and collaboration with compliance/legal teams.
feedback_if_recommended: Good recommendation. Retrieval and evaluation depth plus cross-functional experience are relevant here.
feedback_if_not_recommended: Missed opportunity. Candidate has applied retrieval and evaluation experience that fits this role.

job_description: Sales Account Executive for enterprise SaaS. Main responsibilities include outbound outreach, quota ownership, and contract negotiations.
feedback_if_recommended: Recommendation should be reconsidered. This profile is technical, not quota-carrying sales.
feedback_if_not_recommended: Good rejection. Core responsibilities are outside the candidate's background.

job_description: Staff AI Engineer for conversational assistants. Own long-context memory, response quality metrics, prompt strategies, and safe deployment practices.
feedback_if_recommended: Excellent recommendation. The role is tightly aligned with production conversational AI and quality measurement.
feedback_if_not_recommended: This likely should have been recommended due to strong conversational AI and reliability experience.

job_description: Backend Engineer (Go). Build high-throughput APIs and distributed services. Nice-to-have ML experience, but role is primarily Go microservices and low-latency systems.
feedback_if_recommended: Reasonable recommendation if backend systems strength is sufficient despite language preference mismatch.
feedback_if_not_recommended: Also defensible. If Go depth is essential, the candidate may not be the best fit.

job_description: Research Scientist in reinforcement learning for robotics simulation. Heavy focus on academic publishing and novel algorithm development.
feedback_if_recommended: Potentially weak recommendation unless strong RL publication record is demonstrated.
feedback_if_not_recommended: Reasonable rejection if the role is publication-first and robotics-focused.

job_description: AI Product Engineer. Build user-facing AI features end-to-end: retrieval, orchestration, evals, latency optimization, and experimentation loops with PM/design.
feedback_if_recommended: Great recommendation. End-to-end AI product delivery closely matches this profile.
feedback_if_not_recommended: This seems like a missed fit because the candidate has strong end-to-end AI feature experience.

job_description: Data Governance Specialist. Focus on policy documentation, data lineage audits, and regulatory reporting with minimal model development.
feedback_if_recommended: Recommendation may be too optimistic if technical model-building work is expected by the candidate.
feedback_if_not_recommended: Good rejection if preference is for hands-on model and system engineering.

job_description: Principal Retrieval Engineer for enterprise knowledge systems. Requires graph-based retrieval, vector indexing, quality benchmarking, and mentoring engineers.
feedback_if_recommended: Excellent recommendation. Retrieval depth, graph workflows, and mentoring history fit very well.
feedback_if_not_recommended: This appears to be a strong mismatch in decision; role requirements align directly with candidate strengths.
